title: Multi-drug micelle combinations with carboplatin
abstract: Provided are compositions, kits, and methods of treatment including administering to lung, breast, gynecological, and/or gastrointestinal cancer cells a therapeutically effective amount of carboplatin in conjunction with a micelle composition that includes a therapeutically effective amount of paclitaxel, 17-AAG, and rapamycin, wherein the weight ratio of paclitaxel, 17-AAG, rapamycin, and carboplatin is about 1:1:1:1 to about 5:5:1:10 and the micelle includes poly(ethylene glycol)-block-poly(lactic acid) (PEG-b-PLA).
claims: Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS; 1. A method of treatment comprising administering to cancer cells a therapeutically effective amount of carboplatin in conjunction with a micelle composition comprising a therapeutically effective amount of paclitaxei, 17-AAG, and rapamycin; wherein: the cancer cells comprise lung, breast, gynecological, or gastrointestinal cancer cells or a combination of two or more thereof; the weight ratio of paclitaxei, 17-AAG, rapamycin and carboplatin is about 1 : 1 : 1: 1 to about 5:5: 1 : 10; and the micelle composition comprises polyfethyiene glycol)-block-poly(kctic acid) polymers, 2. The method of claim 1 , wherein the method of treatment comprises administering a composition comprising the carboplatin and the micelle composition, 3. The method of claim 1 or claim 2, wherein the weight ratio of paclitaxei, 17-AAG, rapamycin, and carboplatin is about 1 : 1 : 1 : 1 to about 5:5: 1:8. 4. The method of any one of claims 1-3, wherein the weight ratio of paclitaxei, 17-AAG, rapamycin, and carboplatin is about 2:2: 1 :2 to about 2:3: 1 :5. 5. The method of any one of claims 1-4, wherein the therapeutically effective amount of each of paclitaxei and 17-AAG is about 2 mg/kg to about 90 mg/kg and the therapeutically effective amount of rapamycin is about 1 mg/kg to about 50 g/kg. 6. The method of any one of claims 1 -5, wherein the therapeutically effective amount of each of paclitaxei and 17-AAG is about 40 g/kg to about 75 mg/kg and the therapeutically effective amount of rapamycin is about 20 mg/kg to about 40 mg/kg 7. The method of any one of claims 1-6, wherein the therapeutically effective amount of carboplatin is about 2 mg/kg to about 90 mg/kg. 8. The method of any one of claims 1-7, wherein the therapeutically effective amount of carboplatin is about 40 mg/kg to about 75 mg/kg. 9. The method of any one of claims 1-5, wherein the therapeutically effective amount of each of paclitaxel and 17-AAG is about 10 mg/kg to about 25 mg/kg and the therapeutically effective amount of rapamycin is about 3 mg/kg to about 15 mg/kg, 10 The method of claim 9, wherein the therapeutically effective amount of carboplatin is about 10 mg/kg to about 25 mg/kg, i i . The method of any one of claims 1-10, wherein the cancer cells comprise lung cancer cells. 12, The method of claim 11 , wherein the lung cancer cells comprise non-small cell lung cancer cells, 13, The method of any one of claims 1-10, wherein the cancer cells comprise breast, gynecological, or gastrointestinal cancer ceils, 14 The method of any one of claims 1-13, wherein the combined drug loading of paclitaxel, 17-AAG, and rapamycin in the micelles is about 5 wt. % to about 40 wt,%. 15 The method of any one of claims 1- 14, wherein the individual drug loading of paclitaxel, 17-AAG, and rapamycin in the micelles is about 1 wt, % to about 25 wt.%. 16, The method of any one of claims 1- 15, wherein the PEG-b-PLA comprises a polyethylene glycol)-block having a molecular weight of about 1 ,500 to about 30,000 g/mol and a poly(lactie acid) block having a molecular weight of about 1,500 to about 30,000 g/mol, 17, A method of treatment comprising administering to a subject having lung, breast, gynecological, gastrointestinal cancer, or a combination of two or more thereof, a therapeutically effective amount of carboplatin and a therapeutically effective amount of a micelle composition comprising paclitaxel, 17-AAG, and rapamycin; wherein: the weight ratio of paclitaxel, 17-AAG, rapamycin, and carboplatin is about 1 : 1 : 1: ! to about 5:5: 1 : 10; and the micelle composition comprises poiyfethylene giyco!)-bIock-po!y(lactic acid) polymers. 18. The method of claim 17, wherein the subject is a mammal. 19. A composition comprising carboplatin and a micelle composition comprising paclitaxei, 17- AAG, and rapamycin; wherein: the weight ratio of paclitaxei, 17- A AG, rapamycin. and carboplatin is about 1 : 1 1 : 1 to about 3:5: 1 : 10; and the micelle composition comprises polyethylene glycol)-block-poiy(!actic acid) polymers. 20. A kit comprising carboplatin and a micelle composition comprising paclitaxei, 17-AAG, and rapamycin; wherein: the. weight ratio of paclitaxei, 17-AAG, rapamycin, and carboplatin is about 1: 1:1:1 to about 5:5: 1 : 10; and the micelle composition comprises polyethylene glycol)-b3ock-poly{lactic add) polymers.
